title: Help with displaying the Hour column as hh:mm:ss
excerpt: I have a set automation that captures the current time when an item is assigned to a person. But it does not allow me to set the time format as hh:mm:ss. Does anyone have suggestions on how to accomplish this?

posts.author: Luis.1 (Luis Ortega)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a set automation that captures the current time when an item is assigned to a person. But it does not allow me to set the time format as hh:mm:ss. Does anyone have suggestions on how to accomplish this?
